compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md to reference suggestion capture mechanism
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Context
Implement story 6007-fbe4: update project docs to reflect suggestion capture mechanism.

Read the full story context: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 6007-fbe4

## Summary
Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to reference suggestion-record.sh, .suggestions/ store, and the suggestion capture workflow. Follow DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md conventions. This story has task-level authorization for CLAUDE.md safeguard file edits per the story description.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references suggestion capture mechanism
  Verify: grep -q 'suggestion-record\|\.suggestions' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] Follows DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md conventions
- [ ] No pre-commit hook violations
